caribbean.headline: Mild Winds and Moderate Seas Impact Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Grand Cayman is experiencing moderate easterly winds up to 16 knots with wave heights reaching 5.3 feet and a swell period of 6 seconds from the ESE. Rain chances are elevated at 60 percent, indicating scattered showers likely throughout the day while Curacao sees similar conditions with winds near 17 knots.

mediterranean.headline: High Waves and Rain Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing gusty winds up to 27 knots with wave heights reaching 9.8 feet and a dominant southwest swell period of 10 seconds. Rainfall probability is very high at 98 percent, creating challenging conditions for marine and port operations in the Eastern Mediterranean.
